meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: Accelerate Your Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with slow development. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to ship SaaS apps faster and impress your clients. Expert guide for freelancers.
content.answer_block: To eliminate development bottlenecks, integrate Claude Code directly into your terminal to automate repetitive boilerplate and architectural refactoring. By pairing this with Antigravity for intelligent context-aware code generation, you reduce cognitive load, accelerate feature delivery, and maintain production-grade quality, allowing you to scale your freelance output significantly.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is littered with projects that died because they took too long to ship. You know the feeling: you're stuck in a loop of boilerplate setup, debugging dependency conflicts, and manually writing mundane CRUD operations while your client's patience wears thin. The clock is ticking, and every hour spent on low-level syntax is an hour lost on high-value strategy.

But what if you could outsource the drudgery to a terminal-native engineer that never sleeps? By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your development environment into a high-velocity factory. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about reclaiming your time and delivering professional, scalable assets that make clients wonder how you finished in half the time.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean workspace where Claude Code can index your project architecture without noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and create a standard .gitignore and README.md that adheres to professional SaaS best practices.

steps.title: Architecture Blueprinting
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your folder structure and design patterns before writing a single line of application code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a modular, scalable directory structure for a Next.js SaaS app, separating core business logic from UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement the folder structure designed by Antigravity."

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Rapidly generate your API routes and database schemas based on your client's requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a user authentication system including roles, subscription tiers, and audit logs.

steps.title: Context-Aware Refactoring
steps.description: Refactor legacy or messy code blocks using Claude Code's deep understanding of your codebase context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the existing codebase for technical debt and suggest a more performant way to handle state management.

steps.title: Production-Ready Validation
steps.description: Run automated checks to ensure your code meets industry standards before delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the current codebase, checking for hardcoded secrets and insecure API patterns.

pro_tips: Always maintain a .clauderules file in your root to force Claude Code to adhere to your specific coding style and linting preferences.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Unit Test First' prompts, forcing the AI to write failing tests before implementing the logic.
Alias your most complex Claude Code commands in your .zshrc to turn multi-step refactors into a single terminal execution.
Feed your client's brand guidelines into the context window so the generated UI components match their design system perfectly.
When Claude Code gets stuck, use the 'explain' flag to force it to output the architectural reasoning behind its suggested changes.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin building a library of reusable 'Antigravity Prompt Templates' specifically for the types of projects you frequently sell to clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your hours for dollars and start scaling your freelance business with AI-powered development. The tools are ready, the workflow is proven, and your competitors are already catching up. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
